name: hipengine-mtp-d64-cycle1-layer0-parity
commands: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_cycle1_layer0_parity.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --candidate-token 760 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-cycle1-layer0-parity-20260613.json

env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_VERIFY_CHAIN_LINEAR_TLOOP=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_cycle1_layer0_parity.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --candidate-token 760 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-cycle1-layer0-parity-tree-tloop-20260613.json

chain_tloop.verifier_scratch_to_resident: exact for layer-0 conv and recurrent state

tree_tloop.verifier_scratch_to_resident: exact for layer-0 conv and recurrent state

interpretation: Cycle-1 root row starts from identical prefill state and matches serial c1 through layer-0 Conv input/output. Both verifier t-loop GDN producers diverge first at FP32 recurrent_out, and the materialized recurrent state then differs by about 1e-6. The verifier scratch-to-resident copy remains exact. Next fix target is serial-c1-equivalent verifier GDN recurrence arithmetic/order, not full-attention mode, commit copy, or budget policy.
